ab: yaken am anak no tao do pongso.
namen lalima a ka tao do vaay namen.
en: There are five people in our family.

ab: namen talo a maketeketeh do vaay namen.
ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: yaken a ka ni ama a ka ni ina a ka nira kaka a ya matovong do vaay namen.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: ya makarang si ama, si ama am mikalsong.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: Ya magolang si ina, si ina am koysang.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: No ya mian si ama do vaay namen am, na sirisiringen yamen no ciring no tao do pongso.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the Tao language with us at home.

ab: namen makarakarala do pongso no ya maid o araraw no namen ipiweywalam.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: Yaken a ka nira kaka am namen mateneng a manozatoza.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: Ko isaray yamen a asa ka vaay.
en: I like our family very much.
